title: Energy bomb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Energy bombs''' were slow-moving clouds of energy employed as explosive weapons by [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and bombers.

[[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']] was equipped with a [[Bomblet generator/Legends|bomblet generator]] that could generate unlimited energy bombs. This generator was able to hold up to ten bombs at any one time, and recharged whenever one was fired.

The [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] could also carry energy bombs, which would explode on contact with an enemy.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]] {{1st}}
